question: कौन से ग्रामीण उप-जिलों में कुल 500 से अधिक बीसीजी टीकाकरण दर्ज किए गए हैं?

    dg.type_of_area,

    fact_child_immunization_routine fcr
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fcr.geography_id = dg.geography_id

    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area;

question:

WHERE fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic IS NOT NULL 
AND (fcir.bcg_vaccine IS NULL OR fcir.bcg_vaccine = 0);

अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह के उप-जिलों के लिए 2021 के कार्यक्रम प्रबंधन विवरण, जिसमें टीकाकरण सत्र और कंडोम वितरण शामिल हैं, क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार वर्गीकृत करके प्रदान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, T2.YEAR, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD, T3.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, T2.YEAR, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD, T3.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED ORDER BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT dt.month, dg.type_of_area, fp.immunisation_sessions_planned, fp.immunisation_sessions_held, fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed, fp.condom_pieces_distributed 
FROM fact_program_management fp 
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id 
JOIN dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id 
WHERE dt.year = 2021 AND dg.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
ORDER BY dg.type_of_area;

gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T0.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD), AVG(T0.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_WITH_ASHA_PRESENT) FROM FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME T2 ON T0.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T2.YEAR = '2020' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district, 
    AVG(fp.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS average_planned_sessions, 
    AVG(fp.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present) AS average_sessions_with_asha
FROM 
    fact_program_management fp
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE 
    dt.year = 2020
GROUP BY 
    dg.sub_district
ORDER BY 
    dg.sub_district;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district, 
    AVG(fp.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS average_planned_sessions, 
    AVG(fp.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present) AS average_sessions_with_asha

    fact_program_management fp

    dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id

    dg.sub_district

question: अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह में वर्ष 2021 के दौरान प्रशासित कुल विटामिन ए की पहली खुराक और खसरा-रूबेला (MCV1) टीकाकरण का उप-जिलेवार विवरण प्रदान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1), SUM(T2.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district, 
    SUM(fcs.ROTAVIRUS_1 + fcs.ROTAVIRUS_2 + fcs.ROTAVIRUS_3) AS total_vitamin_a_dose_1, 
    SUM(fcs.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS) AS total_measles_rubella_mcv1_vaccination
FROM 
    dim_geography dg
JOIN 
    fact_child_immunization_specialized fcs ON dg.geography_id = fcs.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_time dt ON fcs.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE 
    dg.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
    AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY 
    dg.sub_district
ORDER BY 
    dg.sub_district;
